title: Reinforced furnaces
description: this mod adds new furnace blocks which can smelt multiple slots and also faster smelting
body:
![reinforced furnace UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0265472f5f2492228387ca3ef2089975f18ed8a.png)![netherrack furnace UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e42c1bd8849f8a95f66d824686e1c0325e88803.png)![reinforced netherrack furnace UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/376ccf02b5dd871361864c38c688e11faa7003ea.png)Reinforced Furnaces adds upgraded furnaces that are designed to feel like a natural extension of vanilla Minecraft — just faster, cleaner, and much less annoying to use.

Tired of constantly refilling coal?
Tired of building giant fuel farms just to smelt a few stacks of ore?
This mod removes the boring part and keeps the satisfying part.

To fuel the netherrack furnaces try to use flint and steel on the front face or let the lava flow beneath it.

Reinforced Furnaces introduces fuel-free furnaces with a custom vanilla-style GUI, improved smelting workflow, and a cleaner overall experience. Just place the furnace, throw your items in, and let it cook automatically.

The mod is made to stay simple and lightweight instead of becoming another overcomplicated tech mod. Everything is designed to match Minecraft’s style while still feeling like a real upgrade.

Features:

* Fuel-free furnace system
* Custom furnace GUI
* Vanilla-inspired design
* Faster and smoother smelting
* Simple and lightweight gameplay
* Fits naturally into survival worlds
* Built for Fabric

Planned features:

* Multiple reinforced furnace tiers
* Faster processing upgrades
* Better textures and animations
* Custom blocks and materials
* More automation features later on

Whether you're building a giant survival base or just tired of babysitting furnaces, Reinforced Furnaces makes smelting feel modern without losing the vanilla feel.
to activate fuel free furnace use flint and steel on furnace or just let lava flow beneath it
